title: Emmanuel Katto : How can I define the criteria for executing the webhook based on user input?
excerpt:

posts.author: emmanuelkatto23 (Emmanuel Katto )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I’m Emmanuel Katto, I’ve set up an automation using Microsoft Power Automate that triggers whenever a new item is created. While this works, I’d like to refine it. I want the automation to trigger a webhook only when the new item’s title is “ABC.”

Does anyone know how to configure this, or have any alternative suggestions?

Thanks!

Emmanuel Katto

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@emmanuelkatto23,

Filtering at the trigger level is not currently possible. You will have to use the “when item is created” trigger then filter on the name in Power Automate.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday
